<!-- Keep PRs small and focused on one issue where possible. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] perf (performance)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the changed behavior
- [ ] `python -m pytest memory/agent-memory/tests -q` passes locally
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (stdlib only), or justified below
- [ ] Schema/migration impact on existing SQLite data documented (if any)
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior has a negative test (if applicable)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Code, comments, CLI strings, and prompt text are in English

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that helps review: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots, etc. -->
